name: kaki-survivors-2
description: Canonical WebGPU/refactor production release of Kaki Survivors.

scripts.test: npm run test:renderer && npm run test:racing
scripts.test:renderer:visual: npm run test:renderer:materials && npm run test:renderer:postfx && npm run test:renderer:instanced
scripts.test:racing: node tools/smoke-racing-migration-availability.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-cameras.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-physics.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-tracks.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-draw-track.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-monster.mjs && node tools/smoke-monster-arena.mjs && node tools/smoke-monster-vehicle-physics.mjs && node tools/smoke-monster-records.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-trials.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-crash.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-crash-physics.mjs && node tools/validate-kaki-catastrophe-assets.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-visuals.mjs && node tools/validate-rally-assets.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-lifecycle.mjs
scripts.test:racing:visual: node tools/smoke-racing-visuals.mjs && node tools/validate-rally-assets.mjs && node tools/smoke-racing-lifecycle.mjs
